text.title: AI-Assisted Interview Note Synthesis Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: ingest-and-redact
step.action: Load transcripts; run PII redaction; verify interview_id index.

step.name: first-pass-themes
step.action: LLM extracts candidate themes with linked quotes (interview_id + line range).

step.name: triangulate
step.action: Apply three-source rule; downgrade single-source themes to 'individual-only'.

step.name: rate-confidence
step.action: Assign H/M/L from source count + agreement strength + counter-examples.

step.name: human-verify-and-publish
step.action: Researcher verifies every quote against source; signs off in verified_by.
step.decision-gate: If any quote not found in transcript, send back to LLM pass.
